command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = '' &ListShowingMessage; select @message = @message + 'loadApplicantImage(this);' select @message as message return

#IF @@view = 0 #THEN if @@action = 'Edit' and @@admin <> 1 begin declare @ma_dot varchar(33) select @ma_dot = ma_dot from @@table where ma_hs = @ma_hs if not exists (select 1 from hrrmdot a left join sysunitrights r on a.ma_dvcs = r.ma_dvcs where a.ma_dot = @ma_dot and r.user_id = @@userID and r.r_edit = 1) begin select '' as script, '$NotAuthorized' as message return end end #END
declare @tths varchar(33), @ten_tths nvarchar(511) select @tths = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_tt_tiep_nhan' select @ten_tths = rtrim(case when @@language = 'V' then ten_tt else ten_tt2 end) from hrdmtths where ma_tt = @tths select 'this._tths =''' + rtrim(@tths) + ''';this._tentths =''' + replace(replace(isnull(@ten_tths, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';active$hrRMApplicantProfileInputForm(this);' as message return

#IF @@view = 0 #THEN if @@action = 'Edit' and @@admin <> 1 begin declare @ma_dot varchar(33) select @ma_dot = ma_dot from @@table where ma_hs = @ma_hs if not exists (select 1 from hrrmdot a left join sysunitrights r on a.ma_dvcs = r.ma_dvcs where a.ma_dot = @ma_dot and r.user_id = @@userID and r.r_edit=1) begin select '' as script, '$NotAuthorized' as message return end end #END select 'scatter$hrRMApplicantProfileInputForm(this);' as message return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã ứng viên %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau hoặc không hợp lệ.' else N'The applicant profile code %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã ứng viên %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The applicant profile code %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã ứng viên %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the applicant profile code %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã ứng viên %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the applicant profile code %s. It has already been used.' end

#IF @@action = 'Edit' #THEN &CreateTicket; declare @rkey varchar(32), @imageUrl varchar(4000), @stt_rec char(13), @ma_vtr varchar(33), @ten_vtr nvarchar(511), @ma_bp varchar(33), @ten_bp nvarchar(511), @cookie varchar(32) select @stt_rec = stt_rec, @ma_vtr = ma_vtr, @ma_bp = ma_bp, @cookie = convert(varchar(19), datetime2, 121) from @@table where ma_hs = @ma_hs select @ten_vtr = rtrim(case when @@language = 'V' then ten_vtr else ten_vtr2 end) from hrvt where ma_vtr = @ma_vtr select @ten_bp = rtrim(case when @@language = 'V' then ten_bp else ten_bp2 end) from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp select @rkey = rkey from hreanh where stt_rec = @stt_rec if isnull(@rkey, '') = '' select @imageUrl = '' else select @imageUrl = '../AppHandler/Image.ashx?t=show&k=' + @stt_rec + '&d=' + '@@appDatabaseName' + '&r=' + isnull(@rkey, '') select @ticket as ticket, @rkey as rkey, @imageUrl as imageurl, @ten_vtr as ten_vtr%l, @ten_bp as ten_bp%l, @cookie as cookie return #END

#IF @@admin <> 1 #THEN if not exists (select 1 from hrrmdot a left join sysunitrights r on a.ma_dvcs = r.ma_dvcs where a.ma_dot = @ma_dot and r.user_id = @@userID and r.r_new=1) begin select 'ma_dot' as field, '$NotAuthorized' as message return end #END
declare @ticket varchar(32), @dvcs varchar(33) select @ticket = lower(replace(newid(), '-', ''))
if exists(select * from @@table where ma_hs = @ma_hs) begin insert into @@sysDatabaseName..ticket(ticket, user_id, data, datetime0) values(@ticket, @@userID, '@@appDatabaseName', getdate()) select '' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_hs)) as message, 'resetTicket(this, "' + @ticket + '", "ma_hs")' as script return end
declare @wsID varchar(8) select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where upper(name) = 'M_WS_ID' select @stt_rec = max(stt_rec) from @@table select @stt_rec = @wsID + case when @stt_rec is null then '000000001' else replace(str(cast(substring(@stt_rec, 2, 9) as bigint) + 1, 9), ' ', '0') end + @@id select @dvcs = ma_dvcs from hrrmdot where ma_dot = @ma_dot select @status = '0', @ma_dvcs = @dvcs, @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID update @dqtlv set ma_hs = @ma_hs update @dcc set ma_hs = @ma_hs

declare @script nvarchar(4000), @invoke varchar(4000), @imageUrl varchar(4000), @fileTicket nvarchar(256) select @script = '', @invoke = '', @fileTicket = '' if (@$rkey <> '') begin select @imageUrl = '../AppHandler/Image.ashx?t=show&k=' + @stt_rec + '&d=' + '@@appDatabaseName' + '&r=' + @$rkey select @script = @script + 'setViewPanelImage(this, ' + '''' + @imageUrl + ''');' select @invoke = 'Image.Image.Process.SaveImage(' + rtrim(@$rkey) + ',' + rtrim(@stt_rec) + ',' + '@@appDatabaseName' + ')' end else select @script = 'showBlankImage(this);' + @script
&ListCommand; &PostInserted; insert into hrrmqtlvtd select * from @dqtlv insert into hrrmcc select * from @dcc &ListQuery;, @stt_rec as stt_rec else select '' as message, '' as field, @stt_rec as stt_rec, rtrim(@ho_uv) + space(1) + @ten_uv as ten, @script as script return

#IF @@admin <> 1 #THEN if not exists (select 1 from hrrmdot a left join sysunitrights r on a.ma_dvcs = r.ma_dvcs where a.ma_dot = @ma_dot and r.user_id = @@userID and r.r_edit=1) begin select 'ma_dot' as field, '$NotAuthorized' as message return end #END
declare @ticket varchar(32) select @ticket = lower(replace(newid(), '-', '')) if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_hs = $ma_hs.OldValue) begin insert into @@sysDatabaseName..ticket(ticket, user_id, data, datetime0) values(@ticket, @@userID, '@@appDatabaseName', getdate()) select 'ma_hs' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_hs.OldValue)) as message return end if @ma_hs <> $ma_hs.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where ((ma_hs like rtrim(@ma_hs) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_hs) like rtrim(ma_hs) + '%') and ma_hs <> $ma_hs.OldValue) begin insert into @@sysDatabaseName..ticket(ticket, user_id, data, datetime0) values(@ticket, @@userID, '@@appDatabaseName', getdate()) select 'ma_hs' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_hs)) as message return end
if exists(select * from hrrmlichctuv where ma_hs = $ma_hs.OldValue) or exists(select * from hrrmkqktr where ma_hs = $ma_hs.OldValue) or exists(select * from hrrmkqpv where ma_hs = $ma_hs.OldValue) or exists(select * from hrrmqdtd where ma_hs = $ma_hs.OldValue) begin select replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_hs.OldValue)) as message return end end
#IF $dqtlv.NewValue <> $dqtlv.OldValue #THEN delete hrrmqtlvtd where ma_hs = $ma_hs.OldValue update @dqtlv set ma_hs = @ma_hs #END #IF $dcc.NewValue <> $dcc.OldValue #THEN delete hrrmcc where ma_hs = $ma_hs.OldValue update @dcc set ma_hs = @ma_hs #END

declare @script nvarchar(4000), @invoke varchar(4000), @imageUrl varchar(4000), @dvcs varchar(33), @fileTicket nvarchar(256) select @script = '', @invoke = '', @fileTicket = '' if (@$rkey <> '') begin select @imageUrl = '../AppHandler/Image.ashx?t=show&k=' + @stt_rec + '&d=' + '@@appDatabaseName' + '&r=' + @$rkey select @script = @script + 'setViewPanelImage(this,' + '''' + @imageUrl + ''');' select @invoke = 'Image.Image.Process.SaveImage(' + rtrim(@$rkey) + ',' + rtrim(@stt_rec) + ',' + '@@appDatabaseName' + ')' end &ListCommand; if @ma_hs <> $ma_hs.OldValue begin update hrrmqtlvtd set ma_hs = @ma_hs where ma_hs = $ma_hs.OldValue end #IF $dqtlv.NewValue <> $dqtlv.OldValue #THEN insert into hrrmqtlvtd select * from @dqtlv #END #IF $dcc.NewValue <> $dcc.OldValue #THEN insert into hrrmcc select * from @dcc #END
select @dvcs = ma_dvcs from hrrmdot where ma_dot = @ma_dot update @@table set ma_dvcs = @dvcs, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_hs = @ma_hs
&ListQuery;, @stt_rec as stt_rec else select '' as message, '' as field, @stt_rec as stt_rec, rtrim(@ho_uv) + space(1) + @ten_uv as ten, @script as script return

declare @stt_rec char(13), @ma_dot varchar(33) select @stt_rec = stt_rec, @ma_dot = ma_dot from @@table where ma_hs = @ma_hs
#IF @@admin <> 1 #THEN if not exists (select 1 from hrrmdot a left join sysunitrights r on a.ma_dvcs = r.ma_dvcs where a.ma_dot = @ma_dot and r.user_id = @@userID and r.r_del=1) begin select 'ma_dot' as field, '$NotAuthorized' as message return end #END
if exists(select * from hrrmlichctuv where ma_hs = @ma_hs) or exists(select * from hrrmkqktr where ma_hs = @ma_hs) or exists(select * from hrrmkqpv where ma_hs = @ma_hs) or exists(select * from hrrmqdtd where ma_hs = @ma_hs) begin select replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_hs)) as message return end
delete hrrmqtlvtd where ma_hs = @ma_hs delete hrrmcc where ma_hs = @ma_hs delete hreanh where stt_rec = @stt_rec
